message: Hello! Since we have 20 rounds, let's establish a reliable trade. My cost is in the mid-high range, so please bid generously to ensure we match. I'll ask reasonably so we can both secure consistent profits.
Happy to trade consistently! My budget is somewhat limited, so I'll need reasonable asks to match. Let's find a mutually beneficial price around the middle range - I'll bid fairly if you ask fairly.

Great start! Let's keep our arrangement going. I'll ask 70 this round to stabilize my narrow margins. Please bid at least 75 again to guarantee we match without risking a failed trade for either of us.
